message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on itertools data loss

Fixed silent data loss in itertools operations:

itertools_ops.zig:
- accumulate() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping accumulated values
- groupby() now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping groups/items

These are data-critical operations where silently dropping results would
cause incorrect program behavior.

Note: test_support.zig cleanup operations and debug_reader.zig error printing
intentionally keep `catch {}` as failures during cleanup/error reporting should
not cascade into crashes.
